critical_issues: No visible natural daylight or warm ceiling lighting; corridor renders read as flat/ambient-lit with no windows or daylight cues (views 1-3).
Welcome/school signage is not clearly welcoming/readable from the corridor; the overhead 'WELCOME' appears reversed/oriented incorrectly (view 3).
Room reads severely under-detailed for a modern school lobby spine (no ceiling fixtures, minimal architectural detail/wayfinding), reducing reference-match and simulation realism (views 2-3).
Clear path to the library is not verifiable from the provided views; no library entrance/label is visible (views 1-3).
Several door openings appear as blank white rectangles without visible frames/handles, reducing realism and making door clearance semantics hard to verify (views 2-3).
Visual checklist requirement failed (daylight_and_warm_lighting): No visible daylight sources (windows/bright exterior openings) or warm ceiling light fixtures; lighting reads flat/ambient.

Visual checklist requirement failed (inventory:signage): Entrance signage exists, but the overhead 'WELCOME' appears reversed/oriented incorrectly from the corridor view, so welcoming signage is not clearly achieved.

Visual checklist requirement failed (reference_style): Compared to the reference target, the corridor lacks daylight, ceiling lighting detail, and the warm, finished architectural look; it reads overly empty/simplified.

Visual checklist requirement failed (room_specific_arrangement): A broad open corridor exists, but the required clear path to the library is not verifiable (no visible library doorway/sign), and the lobby-spine identity feels under-realized.
repair_instructions: Add visible exterior-adjacent daylight contribution (windows/clerestory/borrowed light) and warm ceiling light fixtures with believable illumination and shadows.
Fix entrance signage orientation so 'WELCOME' reads correctly from inside the corridor; add additional clear wayfinding signage toward the library.

Increase lobby-spine architectural and school-detail fidelity: ceiling (lights/tiles), baseboards/trim, more realistic door models/frames/handles, and richer organized display areas consistent with the reference.
Make the library connection explicit from this room (clearly visible library doorway and/or readable 'Library' sign) while keeping the path unobstructed.
Maintain wide wheelchair turning zones while adding a more intentional central seating/planter composition (still keeping the main spine open).
Raise these combined scores to the pass threshold: object_relevance, placement_realism, prompt_alignment
room_prompt:
[SCENESMITH_SCHOOL_CONTRACT_V1 room_id=main_corridor profile=school_reference_20260710]
Immutable effective prompt SHA-256: ac8d297cc9a2d605f41b4bcd7abd52aac29bfd0f195875840342ee1e6a7da86f

Use warm cream/beige/off-white walls, light wood furniture and flooring, soft daylight, warm ceiling light, organized school displays, realistic scale, greenery, and clear humanoid/robot circulation. Nothing may float, visibly interpenetrate, block a door, or eliminate a usable walking/turning path.

ROOM-SPECIFIC REQUIRED CONTENTS:
Create the broad open central circulation/lobby spine with clear sightlines and door clearance. Include at least two benches/seating elements, at least four plants/planters, at least two bulletin/display areas, welcoming school signage, and a clear path to the bottom-center double entrance and library. Preserve wheelchair and humanoid turning space.

--- FLOOR-PLANNER CONTEXT (SECONDARY) ---
Broad central circulation spine connecting every functional room.
